How it works

From searching to supported.

Here's how Maria, a Bronx resident, found food assistance after losing her job.
In one afternoon — no calls, no wrong numbers, no dead ends.

Step 01

Maria searches "food" near Mott Haven

She opens HealthPowr, shares her location, and selects Food. Six pantries appear — open today, within walking distance. No hotline to call.

Open

0.9 mi · Sat 10am–2pm
Open
+ 3 more nearby
Step 02

She requests support — 2 minutes, no paperwork

Maria taps BronxWorks and fills a short form. Her request goes directly to a verified caseworker — no middleman, no waiting room. She creates her account at this step, not before.

FAQ

Common questions about HealthPowr

Quick answers about how the platform works for you.

What is HealthPowr and who is it for?

HealthPowr is a free platform connecting NYC residents to nearby housing, food, healthcare, employment, and community resources. It's built for individuals who need help finding services — and for organizations that want to reach and serve more people without the overhead.

Is HealthPowr free to use?

Yes — completely free for community members. You can search for resources, submit requests, and communicate with organizations at no cost. There is no premium tier or hidden fee for people seeking support.

Do I need to create an account to search?

No. You can search for resources near you without creating an account. You'll only need to sign up when you're ready to submit a request to an organization — and that only takes a minute.

How does HealthPowr verify organizations?

Every organization on HealthPowr goes through a manual review before joining the network. We verify their status, service area, and contact information. You'll see a "Verified" badge on every organization profile so you know who you're connecting with.

I run a nonprofit. How can my organization join?

Schedule an intro call with our team using the link on this page. We'll walk you through the platform, answer your questions, and get your organization set up. We're currently onboarding organizations across all five NYC boroughs.

What neighborhoods and boroughs does HealthPowr cover?

HealthPowr is launching first in New York City, with a focus on the Bronx and upper Manhattan. We're actively expanding across all five boroughs. If you don't see resources in your neighborhood yet, check back soon — new organizations are joining weekly.

Is my personal information kept private?

Yes. Your information is only shared with the specific organization you choose to contact. We do not sell your data, share it with advertisers, or use it for any purpose beyond connecting you to the services you requested.
